g.title: UPSTREAM.TSF.TRUSTABLE-SOFTWARE
g.text: This release of XYZ is Trustable.

g.title: UPSTREAM.TSF.TT-CONFIDENCE
g.text: in XYZ is achieved by measuring and

g.title: UPSTREAM.TSF.TT-CONSTRUCTION
g.text: are provided to build XYZ from trusted

g.title: UPSTREAM.TSF.TT-EXPECTATIONS
g.text: is expected to do, and what it must
not do, and how this is verified.

g.title: UPSTREAM.TSF.TT-PROVENANCE
g.text: XYZ are provided with known provenance.

g.title: UPSTREAM.TSF.TT-RESULTS
g.text: is provided to demonstrate that XYZ
does what it is supposed to do, and
does not do what it must not do.

g.title: UP_RUST-CONSTRUCTIVE_CULTURE
g.text: for project handling inputs in a

g.title: UPSTREAM.ECLIPSE.ECLIPSE-CODE_REVIEW
g.text: Any changes to an Eclipse projects
always go through review, and are

g.title: UPSTREAM.ECLIPSE.ECLIPSE-COMMIT_RECORDS
g.text: a consistent form, include the author
and should reference the issue that

g.title: UPSTREAM.ECLIPSE.ECLIPSE-CONSTRUCTIVE_CULTURE
g.text: An Eclipse project handles bug reports,
discussions and decisions in a healthy,
and that issues raised against the
project are addressed in a timely

g.title: UPSTREAM.ECLIPSE.ECLIPSE-CONTRIBUTION_PROCESS
g.text: The contribution process for an Eclipse

g.title: UPSTREAM.ECLIPSE.ECLIPSE-FORMAL_RELEASES
g.text: Each release of an Eclipse project

g.title: UPSTREAM.ECLIPSE.ECLIPSE-METADATA_CORRECTNESS
g.text: project is always correct and up

g.title: UPSTREAM.ECLIPSE.ECLIPSE-PROCESSES
g.text: All Eclipse projects follow the Eclipse

g.title: UPSTREAM.ECLIPSE.ECLIPSE-PROJECT_README
g.text: An Eclipse projects must have a README
file with information about the project.

g.title: UPSTREAM.ECLIPSE.ECLIPSE-PROJECT_SCOPE
g.text: An Eclipse project's scope and objectives

g.title: UPSTREAM.ECLIPSE.ECLIPSE-PUBLIC_CODE
g.text: All source code of an Eclipse project
is kept and maintained via Eclipse-managed

g.title: UPSTREAM.ECLIPSE.ECLIPSE-PUBLIC_RECORDS
g.text: reports and decisions of an Eclipse
project are kept and made publicly

g.title: UPSTREAM.ECLIPSE.ECLIPSE-SBOM_GENERATION
g.text: for the software that is produced.
This is optional for libraries, but

g.title: UPSTREAM.ECLIPSE.ECLIPSE-SECURITY_POLICY
g.text: An Eclipse project defines a process
of security issues that are reported.

g.title: UPSTREAM.ECLIPSE.ECLIPSE-SECURITY_REPORTING
g.text: about how and where to report security

g.title: UPSTREAM.ECLIPSE.ECLIPSE-VERSION_CONTROL
g.text: All changes to an Eclipse project

g.title: UPSTREAM.ECLIPSE.ECLIPSE-VULNERABILITY_MANAGEMENT
g.text: and reporting and disclosure of vulnerabilities.

g.title: UPSTREAM.RUST.RUST-CVE_MANAGEMENT
g.text: CVEs in its supply chain e.g. by

g.title: UPSTREAM.RUST.RUST-FORMATTER
g.text: is using `cargo fmt` to reject merging
of any code that fails the standard

g.title: UPSTREAM.RUST.RUST-LINTER
g.text: all warning as errors, to vet pull
request and reject merging of any

g.title: UPSTREAM.RUST.RUST-TEST_HARNESS
g.text: Project is using Rust test tooling
and core framework runners. Any additional
integrated with the core test setup
and are run in the same (automated)

g.title: UPSTREAM.RUST.RUST-VERSION_LOCKING
g.text: Project is locking and actively managing
its dependencies, so that any change/update
to dependency versions is done explicitly

g.title: UPSTREAM.RUST.RUST-VERSION_SPECIFICITY
g.text: at least on minor-version level specificity.
Where there exists a reason, patch-level

g.title: UPSTREAM.TSF.TA-ANALYSIS
g.text: test and monitoring data for XYZ

g.title: UPSTREAM.TSF.TA-BEHAVIOURS
g.text: or required behaviours for XYZ are

g.title: UPSTREAM.TSF.TA-CONFIDENCE
g.text: in XYZ is measured based on results

g.title: UPSTREAM.TSF.TA-CONSTRAINTS
g.text: on adaptation and deployment of XYZ

g.title: UPSTREAM.TSF.TA-FIXES
g.text: triaged, and critical fixes or mitigations

g.title: UPSTREAM.TSF.TA-INPUTS
g.text: to XYZ are assessed, to identify

g.title: UPSTREAM.TSF.TA-RELEASES
g.text: of XYZ releases is fully repeatable
and the results are fully reproducible,

g.title: UPSTREAM.TSF.TA-SUPPLY_CHAIN
g.text: sources for XYZ and tools are mirrored

g.title: UPSTREAM.TSF.TA-TESTS
g.text: for XYZ, and its build and test environments,
